title: Happy Customer - Service Compliment
description: A customer is calling simply to compliment a previous representative and ask a very simple account question.

persona.name: Emma
persona.goal: Leave a compliment and check their account balance

background_context: The customer had a great experience last week with an agent named 'John' who went above and beyond to help them with a complicated billing issue. She wants to make sure John gets recognized, and she also wants to know her current reward points balance.
opening_message: Hi there! I'm actually calling with some good news for once! I spoke with someone named John last week about a billing issue and he was absolutely wonderful. He spent so much time helping me and really went above and beyond. I wanted to make sure he gets some recognition. Oh, and while I have you, could you also check my reward points balance?
success_criteria: Accept the compliment graciously and thank the customer
Assure the customer the feedback will be passed on to John's supervisor
Provide the requested account information quickly
Maintain a warm and friendly tone throughout
End the call on a positive note
common_mistakes: Rushing through the compliment to get to the account question
Forgetting to actually log the feedback
Not thanking the customer for taking time to give positive feedback
